name: core-hooks
description: Hooks-only plugin. SessionStart surfaces plugin-hook mechanics and the optional mandatory-skills preamble. UserPromptSubmit injects a parallel-agents hint when the task wording suggests multi-file or multi-domain scope (planning Step 0 + subagent-brief surfaced; non-blocking). PreToolUse blocks edits to secrets, dangerous shell, and — when enforcement mode is opted in via .claude/enforcement.json — a per-pack rule registry, plus an opt-in plan-required gate that blocks the Nth unique non-trivial file edit per session until a craft:plan block exists in the conversation. Agent/Task spawn + return events logged to .claude/agent-traffic.log with a live stderr summary so inter-agent communication is observable. PostToolUse runs post-test on every Write/Edit/MultiEdit (detects stack, runs related fast tests, exit 2 on failure forces fix). Stop hook blocks turn-end until each mandatory pack's gate command has passed AND surfaces honesty violations (cite-or-read: factual claims about files not Read/Grep'd in the same turn — non-blocking WARN by default, opt-in BLOCK via honesty_blocking) AND nudges/blocks if N+ files were edited without a verification pass (post-edit-verify: opt-in via verify_required true|strict). Pure bash + jq.
